ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISCHANGED(Owner_Division_update__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Named_Sales_Manager__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Number_of_Contacts__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Number_Of_Open_Meetings__c )), NOT(ISCHANGED(Stage__c )), NOT(ISNEW()), ISBLANK(BillingCountry), NOT(ISCHANGED(OwnerId)), NOT(ISCHANGED(BI_Data__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED( Account_Re_assigned_Date__c )), NOT(ISCHANGED(Last_Activity_Date_by_GTM__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Last_Activity_Date_by_MIR__c)), RecordTypeId <> '012b0000000cfIJ', NOT(CONTAINS($User.FirstName, 'Integration')), NOT(CONTAINS($User.LastName, 'Integration')), $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User', $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User No DF', $Profile.Name <> 'SW Consultants', $User.Id <> '005b0000000lqbn' /*automation user*/ )
